rules.headings: Tight tracking (tracking-tight), leading-none, used for Hero H1, Cards H3.
rules.body: Clean, geometric sans-serif, leading-relaxed for legibility.
rules.overline: Uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], tiny size (text-xs) for labels.
rules.h1_max: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl. Use elegant scaling, not brutalist massive text.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. py-24 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento 'Control Room' grid for dashboard, 'Tetris' grid for landing page features.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometric. Left-aligned text for paragraphs and data.
layout_and_spacing.card_padding: p-8 or p-10 for landing page feature cards. p-6 for dashboard widgets.

surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl, bg-white/[0.02], border border-white/10. Inner 1px stroke mandatory.
surfaces_and_borders.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(139,92,246,0.05)] for neon bloom.
surfaces_and_borders.cards: Subtle rounded corners (rounded-2xl) but sharp inner components (rounded-md). Backgrounds must never be pure black, use #121418 or tinted.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: -translate-y-1, border-white/20, shadow-lg with faint violet/blue glow.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Framer Motion. Fade in up (y: 20, opacity: 0).
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Smooth transitions on all interactive elements. transition-all duration-300 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.3d_elements: React Three Fiber with @react-three/drei. Use <Sphere> with MeshDistortMaterial for the holographic orb, and <Sparkles> for floating ambient particles.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/40 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-blue-600 text-white shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)] rounded-full px-8 py-3

components.cards: Glass panels with 'Tracing Beam' border effect on hover.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI heavily customized. bg-black/50, border-white/10, focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500.

media.icons: lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone). Use react-icons/fc for Google logo.

images.description: Abstract dark glass texture with wavy lines for subtle overlay behind hero or sections.
Cinematic dark office lighting to use for contextual UI mocked inside an environment or as a fallback.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio. Minimum 4.5:1 for body text.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on inputs and buttons using focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-violet-500.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

implementation_instructions: Build pure HTML/Tailwind layout for Marketing sections. Use raw divs and spans.
Use highly customized Shadcn components for Dashboard logic (Forms, Select, Dialog).
Important: The project uses .js files, NOT .tsx. Provide all React code as modern JavaScript (JSX).
Hero Section: Implement a 3D holographic orb using Three.js / React Three Fiber. Add floating ambient particles.
Global layout: Apple x OpenAI x Vercel vibes. Emphasize generous whitespace, dark high-contrast components, and elegant typography.
